claims.headline: Boosts brain growth signals
claims.notesSentence: Elevates brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and TrkB activity in the rat basal forebrain.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax NGF and BDNF gene expression study on PubMed

claims.headline: Supports brain recovery
claims.notesSentence: Semax suppresses post-ischemic inflammatory proteins and activates CREB-mediated recovery signaling in a rat cerebral ischemia-reperfusion model.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax neuroprotection ischemia-reperfusion study on PubMed

claims.headline: Sharper focus & memory
claims.notesSentence: Semax activates neurotransmission-related gene expression and counteracts ischemia-driven suppression of neural signaling in rat brain models.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax neurotransmission gene expression study on PubMed

claims.headline: Protects brain cells
claims.notesSentence: Modulates neurotrophic and anti-apoptotic gene expression implicated in neuronal survival.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax neuroprotection ischemia study on PubMed

claims.headline: Calms the stress response
claims.notesSentence: A non-hormonal ACTH 4-10 derivative with documented anxiolytic and stress-buffering effects in animal models.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Semax anxiolytic and stress attenuation study on PubMed
